channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🟡 Dossier 2026-04-17 — NORMAL · Gold: HIG
item.description:
🟡 NORMAL · SPY ▲ 0.2% · VIX 17.9

Alright, folks, the market's in a snooze-fest with the **VIX** at **17.

🥇 Gold Pick: HIG — Score: 46/100 (A)

📡 182 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"Life is short. Your options expiry is shorter." — Sam
